original_text:
### Image Treatment
- Photography: **warm, realistic patient lifestyle imagery** — real moments of simple, everyday activity (walking the dog, beach, BBQ). Conveys returning to everyday life and "getting back to themselves."
- Images are housed in the **Accent shape** (§2.5) — asymmetric rounded-corner crops, not plain rectangles or circles.
- Waves and gradients may overlay photography.
- Every image requires **descriptive alt text** (brand accessibility rule).

relations.note: Optional waves and gradients may overlay photography that uses the required image treatment and Accent shape crop.

quotes: Images are housed in the **Accent shape** (§2.5) — asymmetric rounded-corner crops, not plain rectangles or circles.

Photography: **warm, realistic patient lifestyle imagery** — real moments of simple, everyday activity (walking the dog, beach, BBQ). Conveys returning to everyday life and "getting back to themselves."
Images are housed in the **Accent shape** (§2.5) — asymmetric rounded-corner crops, not plain rectangles or circles.

rules.intent: Present relatable recovery-to-everyday-life imagery in the distinctive brand image container.
rules.rule_text: Photography uses warm, realistic patient lifestyle imagery that shows simple everyday activity and conveys returning to everyday life; images are housed in the Accent shape crop (asymmetric rounded corners), not plain rectangles or circles.

quotes: Waves and gradients may overlay photography.

rules.intent: Allow brand graphic depth over photographic imagery.
rules.rule_text: Waves and gradients may overlay photography.

quotes: Every image requires **descriptive alt text** (brand accessibility rule).
Every image requires **descriptive alt text** (brand accessibility rule).

rules.intent: Ensure image content is accessible to people using assistive technologies.
rules.rule_text: Every image requires descriptive alt text.
